note: Clinic proposes a new time — still a request to (re)book, taxonomy has no distinct reschedule type so it maps to appointment_request.

input.rawContent:
From: frontdesk@littlesprout-pediatrics.ca
Subject: We need to move your appointment

Unfortunately Dr. Okafor is out on June 23. Can we move Baby Chen's visit to June 25 at 2:00 PM, or would you prefer another day? Please reply with what works.
